_note: fpocket calibration panel. 'ligand_site_druggability' is the fpocket score of the pocket overlapping the experimentally bound ligand (the validated site); for the druggable controls (PPARg 2PRG, ERa 1ERE) this is a KNOWN-druggable orthosteric NR pocket and sets the reference for what >=0.5 means in our pipeline. Compare the NR4A2 AF2 model max vs the 1OVL crystal max to gauge model over-call. Same fpocket and file->pocket mapping (fpocket_lib) as the main pipeline.

references.1OVL: Wang Z et al., Nature 423:555-560 (2003) — Nurr1 LBD, no canonical pocket
references.de Vera 2019: de Vera IMS et al., Structure 27(1):66-77 (2019) — Nurr1 pocket is dynamic, expands from the collapsed crystal conformation to bind fatty acids
references.2PRG: Nolte RT et al., PPARgamma LBD + rosiglitazone
references.1ERE: Brzozowski AM et al., Nature 389:753 (1997), ERalpha LBD + 17beta-estradiol

results.note: Nurr1/NR4A2 LBD (AF2) — model whose top pocket scored 0.80
PPARgamma LBD + rosiglitazone (known druggable orthosteric pocket)
